headline: Monday's session: top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index
summary: Let's delve into the developments on the US markets in the middle of the day on Monday. Below, you'll find the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Historic Domino's Franchise Names New CEO
summary: RPM Pizza, LLC, operating as Domino's Pizza, today announced a successor to longtime Franchise owner, Glenn Mueller.

headline: Domino's Pizza: Dividend Increase, One Of The Few Restaurant Stocks To Grow
summary: Domino's Pizza stands out as a resilient outlier within a challenged restaurant sector. Read why I reiterate my Buy rating for DPZ stock.
